Overview of the Company: Apple Inc. is an American multinational technology company headquartered in Cupertino, California, in Silicon Valley, and known for consumer electronics, software and online services.
Services / Offerings / Products: Consumer electronics, software, online services, Apple Watch Pride Edition Sport Loop, watch faces, iPhone and iPad wallpapers, and Apple Intelligence.
Remote Work Policy: Employees are allowed to work from anywhere for up to two weeks per year.
Work culture: Strict confidentiality requirements; employees are warned on day one that intentional or unintentional disclosure of company secrets results in immediate termination. The company provides new employees with lunches.
Legal Issues / Controversies: The #AppleToo movement has collected nearly 500 testimonies from employees regarding experiences of discrimination, harassment, and abuse at the company.
Recent News: Apple announced Apple Intelligence, a new AI system for its products; the company is also facing the #AppleToo movement regarding workplace culture and has implemented a new policy allowing employees to work from anywhere for up to two weeks per year.
Innovation Roadmap: Integration of Apple Intelligence and ChatGPT capabilities into products and workflows.
AI/ML Adoption Level: High; recently announced 'Apple Intelligence' to integrate AI across products and workflows.
Interesting Facts: The company celebrates LGBTQ+ communities through initiatives like the Apple Watch Pride Edition Sport Loop, watch faces, and wallpapers.
